text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Among the roster for the Japan Cup are Zenno
Rob Roy and Special Week, both of who have
returned to racing after a long hiatus.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Both are top-tier racers—but that is within
expectations.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The crowd awaits with bated breath, anticipating
a fierce battle ahead. Meanwhile, Eishin Flash
maintains a confident resolve.
